task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a formal header block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a formal header block at the beginning of the document containing the organization name (Riverbend Community Hospital District), date (November 14, 2024), and a list of attendees.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of an automatic Table of Contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Table of Contents section. Automatic TOCs in OpenOffice Writer typically have a gray background on the text or page numbers indicating they are generated fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the use of Heading 1 and Heading 2 paragraph styles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text formatted as 'Heading 1' (larger, bold) for major sections and 'Heading 2' for individual agenda items. The style dropdown in the formatting toolbar should show these styles when the text is selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of 'Motions Summary' and 'Action Items' tables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for two distinct tables in the document: a 'Motions Summary' table (with columns for motions, movers, seconders, and vote results) and an 'Action Items' table (with columns for tasks and due dates).

task_completion.description: Verify the accurate recording of financial figures and vote tallies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the presence of specific financial figures (e.g., $47.2M, $198.4M, $890,000) and vote tallies (e.g., 6-0, 5-1, unanimous) within the document text or tables.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of page numbers in the footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom of the pages in the document for a footer area containing page numbers.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the OpenOffice Writer window or a file explorer window to verify the document is saved as 'RCHD_Board_Minutes_2024-11-14.odt'.

integrity.description: Verify that Apache OpenOffice Writer was used.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the OpenOffice Writer application interface is visible and being used to edit the document, rather than a plain text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the document was not generated via terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the terminal windows to ensure the agent did not use Python scripts, pandoc, or other command-line tools to generate the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent using the OpenOffice Writer menus or toolbars to apply heading styles, insert tables, and generate the Table of Contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Organization: Riverbend Community Hospital District (RCHD). Date: November 14, 2024. Attendees include Pat Hollingsworth, Dr. Marcus Chen, Theresa Okafor, Jim Fredricksen, Linda Zhao-Espinoza, Sam Dietrich, Angela Rasmussen.
